title: Red1's Crafter Receipe
description: A simple datapack that adds the crafter's receipe.
body:
Just a simple datapack to add the crafter's receipe to servers. Use in combination with this or it (probably) won't work : 
[https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-trial-chambers](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-trial-chambers)


I used this tool to generate the datapack
[https://crafting.thedestruc7i0n.ca/](https://crafting.thedestruc7i0n.ca/)
